text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Substance Use Disorder Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Agricultural Laborers Foster Families Mental Health Issues Older Adults Substance Use Disorder Issues Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BAY AREA FIRST STEP INC LAKEVIEW VILLAGE APARTMENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides National Alliance for Recovery Residences (NARR) accredited affordable recovery studio and two bedroom apartments combined with peer-based recovery support. 155 S Empire Boulevard Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Individuals in recovery from substance abuse use disorders and their families. Household income limits apply. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm Email (541) 756-3111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BAY AREA FIRST STEP INC LAKEVIEW VILLAGE APARTMENTS
